coupled_work_rationale: Administrative lexicon plan landing: the staged payload lands the approved plan and creates the five dependent implementation beads before work begins.

atomicity.message: Administrative lexicon plan landing: one docs/tracker payload containing plans/lexicon.md plus the five approved lexicon implementation beads; no source implementation changes.

conditions.message: Mechanical check passed: cached diff is syntactically clean and docs/tracker-only.
evidence: git diff --cached --check exited 0 with no output.
git diff --cached --stat shows only .beads/issues.jsonl and plans/lexicon.md, 424 insertions.
Plan includes suggested verification for later implementation units.

conditions.message: Docs/tracker-only plan landing; no implementation or release action staged.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status shows only M .beads/issues.jsonl and A plans/lexicon.md.
plans/lexicon.md states this is a plan landing before implementation units and OSL launch scrub.
No source implementation, release action, visibility change, or command behavior change is staged.

conditions.message: Judgment check passed: plan has concrete owner-ruling vocabulary, scoped implementation beads, and no proof-free done markers.
evidence: Staged plan contains D-LEX owner rulings, explicit non-renames for stable paths/schema/flags, robot JSON protections, negative burp-use rules, and work-unit/bead/feature boundaries.
Cached tracker diff contains exactly the five lexicon-scoped bead additions.
Each implementation unit includes acceptance and suggested verification; seal is defined as an attestation rather than replacing formal evidence terminology.

conditions.message: No governed code/function surface is staged.
evidence: Payload is one markdown plan plus tracker records.
No Go/source implementation files are staged.
Later lexicon implementation beads carry their own test requirements.

conditions.message: Judgment check passed: staged plan/tracker payload is complete for an administrative plan landing.
evidence: burpvalve hash --staged matched sha256:c30526c5bad731e7857140fb27fa715819c7f04c78c5e3207873129782104a21 and included exactly .beads/issues.jsonl and plans/lexicon.md.

plans/lexicon.md includes goals, non-goals, D-LEX owner rulings, vocabulary contract, implementation principles, six work-unit sections, sequencing, review questions, acceptance criteria, and verification commands.
Five lexicon bead records are staged and preserve all implementation scopes; br dep cycles is clean.

conditions.message: Judgment check passed: the plan and tracker record concrete verification/evidence expectations.
evidence: git diff --cached --check passed.
plans/lexicon.md records suggested verification commands/evidence expectations including grep checks, targeted Go tests, full go test ./..., and diff checks where applicable.
Agent Mail packets 3202/3203 and verdicts 3204/3207 bind verifier evidence to staged hash sha256:c30526c5bad731e7857140fb27fa715819c7f04c78c5e3207873129782104a21.

conditions.message: Judgment check passed: staged scope is limited to the approved lexicon plan landing.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-only has no path outside .beads/issues.jsonl and plans/lexicon.md.
Cached tracker diff has five lexicon additions, no lexicon removals, no non-lexicon record additions, and no record removals in the staged tracker diff.
plans/lexicon.md forbids explain-terms/glossary commands, mass stable-surface renames, launch scrub, license flip, history rewrite, and visibility changes.
Unrelated worktree dirt is unstaged and not included in the hash.

conditions.message: No destructive operation is staged; destructive/launch actions are explicitly out of scope.
evidence: plans/lexicon.md Non-Goals forbid launch scrub, license flip, history rewrite, public visibility change, command/schema/path mass renames, and stable feature-binding renames.
Staged grep found protective/deferential language rather than staged destructive actions.
Tracker changes are new lexicon beads only.

conditions.message: Staged payload hash and tracker structure are coherent.
evidence: burpvalve hash --staged included exactly .beads/issues.jsonl and plans/lexicon.md at sha256:c30526c5bad731e7857140fb27fa715819c7f04c78c5e3207873129782104a21.
verifier prompts produced the same staged hash and manifest hash.
Cached tracker diff contains exactly five project-readiness-kit-lexicon additions and no non-lexicon staged tracker rows.
br dep cycles reported no dependency cycles.

conditions.message: Stable machine-readable and compatibility surfaces are protected by the plan.
evidence: Plan explicitly says not to rename --feature, feature JSON fields, Go Feature structs, response/template fields, feature_name, stable paths, schema keys, flags, or attestation directories.
Plan protects robot JSON and structured result messages from metaphor-only rewrites.
No secrets, credentials, network automation, public visibility flip, license flip, or release action is staged.
Payload is .beads/issues.jsonl plus plans/lexicon.md.
Verified by git diff --cached --name-status and git diff --cached --stat.

conditions.message: No performance-governed runtime code is staged.
evidence: Payload is a markdown plan and tracker rows only.

conditions.message: Judgment check passed: staged plan follows the owner directive without autonomous launch or scope expansion.
evidence: plans/lexicon.md cites the 2026-07-03 owner directive and requires Unit 1 to record D-LEX provenance before surface text changes.
Non-goals and sequencing prohibit launch scrub, license flip, history rewrite, public visibility change, command/API/path/schema renames, and require separate small commits unless owner batches them.
Staged payload contains no external publication, release, visibility, code behavior, or autonomous launch action.
